format.note: Pre-existing formatting issues in many files (not related to PR 2896); no new formatting issues in PR 2896 files

test.note: All packages pass including internal/runtime/executor (the PR 2896 target package)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The pr-replay-worker skill should note Windows compatibility requirements. It references .factory/init.sh (shell script) and a 'file-group-reviewer' subagent type, neither of which is available on Windows. Workers should be instructed to use equivalent Windows commands or the 'worker' subagent as a fallback.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The pr-2896 replay worker deviated in two places: ran 'go mod download' directly instead of init.sh, and used 'worker' subagent instead of 'file-group-reviewer'. Both were justified substitutions on Windows.
